study_title: The absence of pollen in the diet of worker honeybees triggers premature aging
exp_title: mRNA library from Pollen-based Diet Replicate 2
design: The library was constructed following the TruSeq RNA Sample Preparation protocol (Illumina, San Diego, CA, USA).
sample_description: A pool of RNA extracted from 4 abdominal carcasses containing fat body tissue of 7-day-old adult bee workers fed on pollen-based diet
center: School of Agricultural and Veterinary Sciences, Sao Paulo State University (Unesp)
